chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

text: 2953 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَى اَلْمَسْجِدِ اَلْحَرَامِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2953 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one sees the Sacred Mosque (Masjid al-Haram)."
